description_long: This object is a large, ornate pipe organ with a wooden base and an array of tall, cylindrical metal pipes arranged in a symmetrical pattern. The pipes vary in height, with the tallest ones positioned centrally and shorter pipes flanking them on both sides, creating a visually striking, cathedral-like appearance. The base features a keyboard with white and black keys, and a wooden bench is integrated into the structure for the player. The pipes have a weathered, slightly tarnished metallic finish with patches of discoloration, suggesting age and use. The woodwork is dark and robust, with visible grain and a matte finish, adding to the instrument's antique character. No visible brand, logo, or straps are present, and the rear side reveals the open structure behind the pipes.
description: A large, antique pipe organ with a wooden base and an array of tall, weathered metal pipes arranged symmetrically. The instrument features a central keyboard and a visually striking, aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of metal pipes, the central keyboard, and the wooden base with integrated bench.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the organ, the cylindrical shape of the pipes, and the layered arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open structure behind the pipes and the back of the wooden base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and staggered arrangement of the pipes.
